# B&F (BnF)

> Hyper-automated MarTech & Brand Solutions Group specializing in medical and beauty businesses. We combine cinematic branding with hyper-automation IT infrastructure to design the complete conversion flywheel — from cinematic frame to converted patient.

B&F is a Seoul-based integrated MarTech and brand solutions group founded in 2024. We serve medical and beauty businesses globally, providing infrastructure that converts brand awareness into measurable business outcomes across 9 languages.

## Core Services

- **Cinematic Branding**: Commercial-film-grade brand films and interview videos with automated NAS-based media workflows for fastest-to-market deployment.
- **Hyper-Automation**: Make/Webhook pipelines that synchronize Meta and Google leads with hospital CRMs in real-time. Python-based data engines deliver insights to executives via Telegram integration.
- **Global Patient Acquisition**: Localized marketing across 9 languages (Korean, English, Japanese, Simplified/Traditional Chinese, Mongolian, Filipino, Thai, Vietnamese). Coverage spans Xiaohongshu, WeChat Mini Programs, WhatsApp consultation flows.
- **Next.js Web Engineering & CRO**: SSR-based loading performance with built-in SEO. Form UX design and conversion-rate optimization that transforms websites from digital business cards into the most powerful marketing weapon.

## What Makes Us Different

- **Where ads meet engineering**: Most ad agencies don't understand code; most dev shops don't understand marketing funnels. We control everything in-house — strategy, Meta Pixel/CAPI setup, server provisioning, zero-trust security architecture.
- **The next search frontier**: Beyond keyword visibility, we build Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) infrastructure so global patients see our clients first when AI search engines recommend providers.
- **Strategic booking simulation**: Beyond simple inquiry collection, we engineer calendar algorithm logic. Future booking-rate simulation (50% at 1 month, 35% at 2 months) maximizes conversion through psychological mechanisms implemented in code.

## Vision

Beyond agency. Our long-term vision is to evolve into a global medical tourism C2E (Community to Earn) platform — connecting global medical consumers with Korea's top-tier hospitals. Our current MarTech and brand solutions form the foundational system of this larger ecosystem.
